package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for formfile_open_readall_whole_upload: Gin handlers that open uploaded form files and then materialize them with io.ReadAll(...).
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule314NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule314NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule314NegativeRecord) (Rule314NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario314Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule314NegativeService, input Rule314NegativeRecord) (Rule314NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule314NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
